name: Western Union
description_short: Western Union at 2140 El Camino Real, Santa Clara, CA 95050 is open 8:00 AM – 9:00 PM daily. Call +1 408-246-1054.
description_long: This Western Union location functions as a local agent for the Western Union money transfer network. Typical services at branded agent locations include sending and receiving domestic and international wire transfers, purchasing money orders, and making bill payments. Specific services, hours, and fees vary by location — contact the store directly using the phone number above for current availability.
address: 2140 El Camino Real, Santa Clara, CA 95050

company_info.headquarters: 2140 El Camino Real, Santa Clara, CA 95050

pros: Competitive auto loan rates starting at 5.49% APR for new vehicles
Kasasa Cash Back Checking account offering 3% cash back on debit card purchases up to $400 per cycle
Certificate rates as high as 3.46% APY, competitive for savings products
Multiple branch locations with extended drive-through hours (7:30am-5:30pm weekdays)
On-site ATMs at all listed branch locations for member convenience
Active community engagement with member events (shred days, car shows, donation programs)
Comprehensive financial education content covering credit, debt, and money management topics
cons: Geographic limitation—appears to serve only specific Oklahoma communities; membership eligibility not clearly stated on website
Website does not clearly explain membership requirements or how non-community members can join
Limited transparency on checking account fees, minimum balances, or other account requirements not listed on main pages
No mention of credit builder loans, secured cards, or other credit-building products for members with poor credit histories
Boat loan rates (7.64% APR) are notably higher than auto rates, limiting appeal for that product
best_for: Oklahoma residents seeking competitive auto and vehicle financing with personalized service
Community members looking for a not-for-profit alternative to traditional banks for checking and savings
People interested in cash-back rewards checking accounts tied to debit card usage
Savers seeking competitive certificate of deposit rates
diagnosis: Western Sun Federal Credit Union is best for Oklahoma-based consumers who qualify for membership and want competitive auto financing combined with community-focused banking. The primary caveat is geographic—service appears limited to specific Oklahoma areas, and the website does not clearly state membership eligibility criteria or procedures for joining online, making it inaccessible for consumers outside their service territory.
services: Kasasa Cash Back Checking (3% cash back on eligible purchases)
ATM access at multiple branch locations
Auto buying resource tool (free vehicle search for local new and pre-owned cars)
meta_title: Western Sun — Credit Union in Broken Arrow, OK | CreditDoc
meta_description: Western Sun — NCUA-insured credit union in Broken Arrow, OK. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
